description_long: This is a classic four-door sedan with a two-tone paint job, featuring a vibrant red upper body and a white lower section. The car has a boxy, vintage design with chrome accents on the bumpers, door handles, and window trim. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by rectangular headlights, and the rear window is covered by black horizontal louvers. The wheels are simple, black steel rims with a utilitarian appearance, and the tires show some wear. Both front and rear license plates are present, with the rear plate being more clearly visible. The overall condition of the car suggests it has seen regular use, with some visible wear and minor surface imperfections.
description: A vintage red and white four-door sedan with chrome accents, black steel wheels, and horizontal rear window louvers. The car has a boxy shape and visible license plates.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the red trunk, black horizontal louvers on the rear window, and a visible rear license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone red and white paint, four doors, and black steel wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, rectangular headlights, chrome bumper, and a front license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two-tone paint, four doors, and black steel wheels.
attribute_license_plate: Both front and rear license plates are present; the rear plate is white with blue text, partially readable as 'A1U2C'.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple black steel wheels with a solid center and no visible spokes.
